title: Wrong answer from merge table after content changes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sub1 (i INT NOT NULL, j VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE sub2 (i INT PRIMARY KEY, k FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO sub2 (i, k) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 3.14);
SELECT * FROM sub1 JOIN sub2 ON sub1.i = sub2.i WHERE sub2.k IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: merge table returns incorrect results after content changes
